Ready to start your project?

E-Commerce Performance Marketing: Scaling ROAS from 0.5x to 3x

20 Mar 2026
Code Visionary Services

Overview

Jolger Activewear, a growing D2C fitness apparel brand, approached us with a critical challenge — their paid marketing efforts were not generating profitable returns. Despite consistent spending, the brand was operating at a 0.5x ROAS, making scaling unsustainable.

Our goal was to turn performance around by building a strong brand identity and implementing a data-driven performance marketing system that could drive profitable growth.

The Challenge

Unprofitable Ad Spend

With a ROAS of just 0.5x, the brand was losing money on every acquisition.

Lack of Brand Identity

The brand lacked a clear positioning, making it difficult to stand out in a highly competitive activewear market.

Weak Creative Strategy

Ad creatives failed to communicate value, resulting in low engagement and poor conversion rates.

Inefficient Funnel

The customer journey lacked structure, leading to drop-offs and missed conversion opportunities.

Our Approach

We rebuilt Jolger’s growth engine by combining brand strategy with performance marketing execution.

Brand Positioning & Identity

We defined a clear brand voice, visual identity, and messaging that resonates with the target audience — creating differentiation in a crowded market.

Creative Strategy Overhaul

Developed high-performing ad creatives focused on:

  • Product benefits
  • Lifestyle storytelling
  • Performance-driven messaging

Full-Funnel Optimization

Structured campaigns across the funnel:

  • TOFU: Awareness-driven creatives to attract new users
  • MOFU: Engagement-focused content to build trust
  • BOFU: Conversion-focused ads with strong CTAs

Data-Driven Campaign Management

Continuous testing, optimization, and scaling based on performance metrics.

Landing Page & Conversion Optimization

Improved user journey and messaging to increase conversion rates.

The Solution

We implemented a performance-driven marketing system designed for scale:

  • Structured full-funnel ad strategy
  • High-converting creatives aligned with brand identity
  • Audience segmentation and targeting optimization
  • Continuous A/B testing and iteration
  • Conversion-focused landing experience

Results

The transformation delivered strong, measurable outcomes:

  • ROAS improved from 0.5x to 3x
  • Significant increase in conversion rates
  • Lower cost per acquisition (CPA)
  • Stronger brand recognition and engagement
  • Scalable and profitable marketing system

Conclusion

By aligning brand identity with performance marketing, we helped Jolger Activewear move from unprofitable campaigns to a scalable, high-ROI growth engine.

This wasn’t just about improving ads — it was about building a brand that converts.
